# TASK_TEMPLATE

> Canonical operational copy, consumed directly by `@coordinator` and delegated agents.
> This is the single source of truth for this template — do not duplicate its content
> elsewhere. `docs/architect-consultant/` references this file by path.

## Current Stage

- Stage name
- Stage objective

## Objective

- What this task must accomplish

## Inputs

- Required inputs
- Existing evidence or context

## Constraints

- Frozen architecture boundary
- Current stage scope only
- Explicit non-goals

## Allowed Decisions

- Allowed actions for this task

## Forbidden Decisions

- Forbidden actions for this task

## Implementation

- Step-by-step execution plan
- Minimal required changes only

## Verification

- How to verify the work
- What must be checked before completion

## Definition of Ready

- Required preconditions before starting this task

## Definition of Done

- Required completion criteria

## Output

- Expected result of the task

## Risks

- Known implementation risks

## Remaining Work

- What remains after this task

## Next Recommended Stage

- The next stage to execute after this task
